name: Chicken with Peppercorn Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the salt, pepper, paprika, garlic, and basil until it is a powder.
2. Sprinkle this mixture over the chicken breasts.
3. Heat the cooking oil in a frying pan and sauté the chicken until it is cooked but not overcooked or dry.
4. Brush another frying pan with remaining cooking oil and sauté the onions until they are transparent.
5. Add white wine to the pan and reduce until it forms a syrup.
6. Add half of the green peppercorns and crush them in the pan.
7. Add chicken stock and reduce by half.
8. Transfer the liquid from the pan into a blender and blend until smooth.
9. Return the mixture to the frying pan, add the remaining peppercorns (do not crush), and 35% cream.
10. Cook slowly until the mixture thickens.
11. Pour over the cooked chicken breasts and enjoy.
